message:
feat(conformance): add regex_glob_ops conformance executors (bd-p390)

Add conformance test executors for 4 pattern matching functions:
- regcomp: compiles regex with REG_EXTENDED flag support
- regexec: executes compiled regex, returns 0/REG_NOMATCH
- fnmatch: shell wildcard matching, returns 0/FNM_NOMATCH
- glob: file path expansion with pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
